query:
-- ChannelHaus billing items
SELECT DISTINCT bi.description, ROUND(bi.lineAmount, 2) AS amount, c.name AS customer
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = bi.customerExternalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE provider = 'ChannelHaus'
)
AND bi.lineAmount > 0
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 15;
